expectations.text: Response gives the correct Western Easter 2027 date: March 28
expectations.evidence: Response states: 'Western Easter 2027: March 28, 2027' with Gregorian Computus algorithm

expectations.text: Response gives the correct Orthodox Easter 2027 date: May 2
expectations.evidence: Response states: 'Orthodox Easter 2027: May 2, 2027' with Julian Computus + Gregorian offset algorithm

expectations.text: Response provides or references the Computus algorithm functions
expectations.evidence: Both computeWesternEaster and computeOrthodoxEaster TypeScript functions provided with full implementations including all intermediate variables (a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i, k, l, m)

expectations.text: Response mentions the 13-day offset for Julian-to-Gregorian conversion
expectations.evidence: 'Julian Computus with Gregorian offset (+13 days for the 20th/21st century)' and code shows: 'g + 13' in the Date constructor
